name: §6Giraffe
description:
§8Foraging Pet

§7Health: §c100
§7Crit Chance: §95%
§7Swing Range: §e[Swing Range]

§6Good Heart
§7Grants §c+199❣ Health Regen

§6Higher Ground
§7Increases your §9☠ Crit Damage §7and
§c❁ Strength §7by §c0.15% §7for every
§e0.1Ⓢ Swing Range §7over §e3Ⓢ §7(up to
§e6Ⓢ§7)

§6Long Neck
§7Increases your melee damage by
§c100% §7if you are more than 3 blocks
§7away from the target

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Bamboo Giraffe Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aGiraffe§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
